headline: Duke Energy (DUK) Receives More DOE Grants
summary: Duke Energy Corp. (NYSE:DUK) is one of the 10 Best Energy Stocks Capitalizing on the Data Center Boom. On June 5, Duke Energy reported that it was selected by the Department of Energy (DOE) for a grant worth up to $61.8 million to refurbish and increase the reliability of coal-fired power plants in Kentucky and […]
